subject: Remove no longer public jonathonf ppa
commit_message:
Remove no longer public jonathonf ppa

Issue-ID: CIMAN-359
Change-Id: I7764d0af3c47b22b00114bb944f5d729a42325d6
Signed-off-by: Marcus G K Williams <marcus.williams@intel.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

I'm not sure if packer is still used to build images, but if so we need to add a new source or build locally for python3.6. 

Jonathonf ppa is no longer public. See: https://launchpad.net/~jonathonf

This appears to be erroring our multicloud/k8s verify builds. See: https://gerrit.onap.org/r/q/project:multicloud%252Fk8s+status:open

I'm attempting to workaround this issue by removing in our local build scripts but we really should not have a source repository that is not working in our VM build.

Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/ci-management-packer-verify/135/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/ci-management-packer-verify/135
Change has been successfully merged by Jessica Wagantall

Patch Set 1:

Thanks Jessica. 

I should add that if there is code or other packages that depend on python3.6 in these ubuntu images we need to add a new source or build locally in the image for python3.6. This patch fixes the build issues caused by absence, but doesn't address adding python3.6 dependency if other software needs it.
